title: parse_fuzz_test crashing test case in `ColumnList::GetColumn`
description:
### What happens?

Hi! We found a crashing test case when testing with the `parse_fuzz_test` fuzzing driver.

### To Reproduce

PoC:
```
CREATE TABLE t1(b INT);
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES(1);
ALTER TABLE t1 ADD COLUMN c.ingest.t.ib INT;
SELECT * FROM t1;
```

Error output:
```
ABORT THROWN BY INTERNAL EXCEPTION: Column with name "c" does not exist
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(a VARCHAR(255), b FLOAT, c BOOLEAN);
ALTER TABLE t2 ADD COLUMN d_invalid_column_name INT;
ALTER TABLE t2 DROP COLUMN c;
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE with invalid column name causes crash
